---
title: "fetch_fans_ranking_tbl"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `fetch_fans_ranking_tbl()`

Fetch Fans Site Rankings

## Usage

```r
fetch_fans_ranking_tbl(
  token = "FLIX_PATROL",
  platform_name = "netflix",
  country_name = "United States",
  start_date,
  end_date,
  media_type = "Movie",
  date_type = "day",
  language = "English"
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `token` | Character. API environment variable name. |
| `platform_name` | Character. The platform (e.g., "Netflix"). |
| `country_name` | Character. The country name. |
| `start_date` | Date/Character. Start date of the ranking. |
| `end_date` | Date/Character. End date of the ranking. |
| `media_type` | Character. "Movie" or "TvShow". |
| `date_type` | Character. Defaults to "day". |
| `language` | Character. Language name for filtering. |

## Value

A tidy tibble of fan rankings.

## Description

Retrieves the "Fans" ranking data for titles based on platform, country, and date range.
